execution_rules.notes: Two sequential phases, no deferred placeholders. Integrator lane.

hard_constraints: Version field flips to 2.0.0 in the same commit as the shape change
Integrator lane: main + push per phase

decisions_log.note: Ruling A accepted verbatim: 'I accept your recomendation please.' Design: phase3-storage-design.md (RULED stamp). Self-scan registry measured 124MB at HEAD - duplication reproduces on core itself.

plan_adjustments.summary: P1 shipped: SemanticRegistryProjection 2.0.0 - top-level rawFactsByFile (one bundle per file), entry.rawFacts removed; registry-generator compacts stringify when serialized >10MB. Self-scan: semantic-registry.json 124,357,065 -> 14,910,149 bytes (88% cut). 4/4 v2 tests; suite 1646 passing, zero failures. Zero in-tree readers (sweep confirmed); version field is the external guard.

P2 shipped. PS re-ground under 2.0.0: semantic-registry.json 56.8MB -> 12.5MB (78% cut). [Note: the May '209MB' was a larger PS tree; tonight's PS measures 56.8MB pre-fix - the % reduction is the durable evidence, not the absolute.] VECTOR-STORE-PATH-FIX: rag-status defaulted vectorsPath to a never-written rag-vectors.sqlite while rag-index/rag-search/orchestrator all default to coderef-vectors.json - rag-status falsely reported 'vectors missing' against good indexes. Fixed to the real default; verified live on PS (Vectors: OK). Suite 1645 passing; 1 failure = documented scanner-export contention flake (isolated rerun 25/25).

communication_log.message: WO created from STUB-BQDXJ0 under ruling A. P1 format change (5 tasks); P2 measurements + vector-store naming (4 tasks).
Phase 1 COMPLETE pending commit. Continuing to Phase 2 (PS re-ground + vector-store naming) per operator standing approval.
Both phases complete: registry 2.0.0 (88% core / 78% PS) + rag-status vector-path fix. Full close-out next.
WO closed (close-only). Roadmap Phase 3 storage complete; only Phase 5 ranking work remains (gated on the eval baseline).

close_metadata.operator_authorization: Ruling A accepted verbatim ('I accept your recomendation please.') + standing approval

audit.tracking_validator_scoped: 17/17 PASS (after correcting WO type improvement->refactor: improvement is not in the workorders schema type enum)
audit.suite: 1645 passing; sole failure is the documented scanner-export contention flake (isolated 25/25)

close_metadata.what_shipped: Commits fade035 (P1 registry 2.0.0, 88% core cut) + 02f75bf (P2 PS re-ground 78% + rag-status vector-path fix). semantic-registry.json: core 124.4MB->14.9MB, PS 56.8MB->12.5MB.
